values.fullName: Project Entered in AHMS- Updates Needed
NOT FOUND - TRANSFERRED TO MUNI ATTRNY

All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage%2E CGP%26H will provide you a list of lenders%2E Lenders not on this list may not be able to finance mortgages for deed restricted affordable homes%2E
There is no fee to apply for this program%2E All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage%2E
Found AH Unit Deed%2C still looking for AHA
Found RESALE AHA but missing origianl
Central AC and Window AC Unit
Central AC and Window AC Unit
Available for Sale - part of group
Available for rent%2Fsale - on hold by finance
Not Owner Occupied - Leased to Tenant
Not in Affordable Portfolio %28Community Room%2C Model Unit%2C Sales Office%2C Etc%2E%29
In process of filling first units
SETUP%3A Enter CDS %2F Binder %2F Project Set-up
Attended 1st meeting and did not check want more info
Attended 1st meeting and want more information
Did not attend 1st meeting but Called and want more information
Met privately with homeowner and owner still deciding
Not eligible for program b%2Fc controls not expiring
Not eligible for program b%2Fc sold out of program
Owner does not want to extend controls
Owner is selling and extending controls
Passed inspection and pending payment%2Fexecution of documents
MOU signed by homeowner and Mayor
0%2E6 Listing sent to landlord%2Fdeveloper waiting for approval
Waiting for home owner to sign
Waiting to come back from county
All time is billable%2E Bill income certifications to development and all other time to municipality
All time is no charge except for income certifications which should be billable
Sent to Tech team for import
CGP%26H does not maintain waiting list%2E Contact complex directly%2E
New project%2E Submit application now to be included in lottery
No units available %2E Medium waiting list%2E Estimated waiting time is 1-2 years
No units available now%2E Units become available regularly%2E Small or no waiting list
No units available%2E Long waiting list%2E Estimated waiting time is 2 years or more
Units available now and being filled from existing waiting list
Units available now%2E Small or no waiting list
Unit Data Not Imported- Research Needed
Unit Data Not Ready- Additional Research Needed
Unit Data Ready for Entry- Missing Initial Leases
No increase - No eligible for new increase b%2Fc selling for lower
No increase - Under contract or certified applicant
Priority 3 increase %E2%80%93 invited to group showing
